name: Pact of the Blade
description: Conjure a magical pact weapon you're proficient with; bond magic weapons to it.

name: Pact of the Chain
description: Learn find familiar; your familiar can take special forms (imp, pseudodragon, quasit, sprite).

name: Pact of the Tome
description: Gain a Book of Shadows holding three extra cantrips from any class.
